  • Overview

  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AIAction
    Represents a fully specified action selected by an AI strategy.
    AIAction.ActionType
    Enumerates AI action categories.
    AIDifficulty
    Enumerates the available AI difficulty presets for computer-controlled players.
    AIPlayer
    Represents a player controlled by an AIStrategy.
    AIStrategy
    Defines the contract for AI turn selection and discard decisions.
    Ansi
    Utility class for wrapping console text with ANSI escape codes when supported.
    Card
    Represents a development card.
    CardDeck
    Represents a development-card deck for one tier.
    CardLoader
    Loads development cards from CSV data.
    ConsoleGameUI
    Runs the interactive console UI for Splendor.
    ConsoleRenderer
    Renders the console presentation of the game.
    EasyStrategy
    Baseline AI that follows simple first-valid heuristics.
    GameEngine
    Applies Splendor rules to a GameState.
    GameSetup
    Builds a new GameState from player and configuration data.
    GameState
    Stores the mutable state of an in-progress Splendor game.
    GemBank
    Tracks the shared supply of gem tokens.
    GemColor
    Enumerates the gem token colors used in the Splendor game.
    HardStrategy
    Advanced AI that favors long-term value and limited opponent blocking.
    Main
    Launches the console-based Splendor application.
    MediumStrategy
    AI strategy that balances card value with short-term progress.
    Noble
    Represents a noble tile.
    NobleLoader
    Loads nobles from CSV data.
    Player
    Represents a player and their cards, nobles, and gem tokens.
    Tier
    Enumerates the three development-card tiers in Splendor.
